summary: Tested Review Mode feature end-to-end: backend APIs and full UI flow. All 10 backend tests pass. UI fully functional with all required elements present.

issues: Card content area has large empty whitespace between summary and signal flags sections on desktop (1920px wide). The flex-1 overflow-hidden div for summary takes too much vertical space leaving gaps. Not breaking but visually sparse.

critical_code_review_comments: onTouchEnd (line 304) reads dragRef.current after setting active=false - startX/startY values are still valid so no bug, but could be more defensive
commitAction statusMap uses 'archived' (lowercase) for archive, 'pipeline' (lowercase) for pipeline, 'Reviewed' (capitalized) for review - inconsistent casing but matches backend allowed values
seed_data_creation: None - used pre-seeded data (VaultAI score 9, GreenLoop score 7, both status=New)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review Mode at /review route fully working. Auth via localStorage vc_token. PATCH /api/deals/{id} tested for pipeline/archived/Reviewed status updates - all return 200. POST /api/sync returns immediately as background task. UI: Review Mode button in Dashboard nav, card swipe interface with progress bar, 4-button bar (Archive/Pipeline/Review/Details), keyboard shortcuts row on desktop, empty state after all cards triaged.
